input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.3.4
            TITLE: the accumulator container(s) may contain holes or openings

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.3.4: The Accumulator Container(s) may contain Holes or Openings
EV.4.3.4 The Accumulator Container(s) may contain Holes or Openings 
a. Only the wiring harness, ventilation, cooling and fasteners may pass through holes in the 
Accumulator Container(s) 
b. Holes and Openings in the Accumulator Container must meet F.10.4   
c. External holes must meet EV.6.1

final_answer: rule EV.4.3.4: The Accumulator Container(s) may contain Holes or Openings EV.4.3.4 The Accumulator Container(s) may contain Holes or Openings a. Only the wiring harness, ventilation, cooling and fasteners may pass through holes in the Accumulator Container(s) b. Holes and Openings in the Accumulator Container must meet F.10.4 c. External holes must meet EV.6.1
